_comment: Multi-level lucky modifier. Each level needs 96 'lapis units' to commit. Sources: lapis lazuli = 1 unit/item, lapis block = 9 units/item. So level 1 = 96 lazuli OR 10 blocks + 6 lazuli OR 9 blocks + 15 lazuli. Each level x1.5: 96, 144, 216, 324... Each level scales BOTH the ore-drop bonus (vanilla Fortune formula) and the mob-drop bonus (Looting-style) and consumes one modifier slot.
